docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) THY PHAM FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF HOWARD HSU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION (THY PHAM) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. EXHIBITS FROM PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSU, HOWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION $477.20 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $507.20, THE COURT FINDS PER GOVT CODE 835 (B) THAT CALTRANS HAD ACTUAL KNOWLEDGE OF A DANGEROUS CONDITION (LARGE POTHOLE ON OCEAN AVE ON RAMP TO HWY 280) IN SUFFICIENT TIME TO HAVE TAKEN ACTION TO PROTECT AGAINST THE DANGEROUS CONDITION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $477.20 FILED BY HSU, HOWARD AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $0.00 SERVED MAY-09-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION
